name: wxcode-admin-coral-billing
title: Coral Billing Admin
description: Clean-fintech billing operations dashboard — left sidebar, topbar with period picker, 4 KPI cards (MRR / active subscriptions / churn / ARPU), inline SVG trend chart, plan breakdown bars, invoices table, and a dunning side panel. Coral accent on white surfaces.

query.en: Build me a billing admin dashboard for a SaaS product — left sidebar, topbar with period picker, MRR and subscription KPIs, revenue trend chart, plan breakdown, invoices table with status pills, failed-payment dunning panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a billing admin dashboard for a SaaS product — left sidebar, topbar with period picker, MRR and subscription KPIs, revenue trend chart, plan breakdown, invoices table with status pills, failed-payment dunning panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
